title: Braid Design System by the SEEK Group
content: Braid from Directories: Components: Braid Design System is developed by the SEEK Group for the development and support of their online employment marketplace product. It offers detailed guidelines and a wide library of components, including Playroom for component experimentation without the need for a development setup. Design System includes well-thought-out themes, and the color palette in the system is designed to have a strong correlation with the tone of voice being used. Color System Repository Icons Layout Responsive Accordion Alert banner Badges Button Button group Cards Checkbox Dialog Divider Drawer Dropdown Label List Menus Pagination Progress indicator Radio button Snackbar Switch Tabs Tag Text area Text field Tooltip
